creator: jan@digitaldaemon.com
text:
Yes, PR amd64/107345 basically is a duplicate.
I thought the dmesg was attached for  107345 if now, let me know so I 
can try to redo this when I have time.

Thanks!
Jan



Gavin Atkinson wrote:
> Hi,
>
> Please supply the output of "dmesg" and "pciconf -l" from this server.
> If "dmesg" doesn't give all of the boot messages, you should find them
> in /var/run/dmesg.boot.  Also, can you confirm that PR amd64/107345 is a
> duplicate of this?
>
> Thanks,
>
> Gavin
>
>
>
